strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong architecture and scalability focus demonstrated in high-traffic systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js (primary backend framework in job description)
No clear mention of Vitest (primary testing framework) in recent roles
Primary stack leans toward JavaScript/TypeScript with limited depth in Kotlin/Java for backend (secondary requirement)
response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack credentials with TypeScript/Node.js and React, plus recent experience in AI-agent infrastructure, which aligns well with the role's primary responsibilities. However, the absence of Nest.js and Vitest in her recent work, combined with limited depth in Kotlin/Java for backend services, raises concerns about direct fit for the specified stack.
